biography: Topel Lee is a Filipino film, television, and music-video director known for his distinct visual style and work in the horror and thriller genres. He began his career directing music videos for top local bands before moving into television and feature films. His notable works include Ouija (2007), Amorosa (2012), and Basement (2014). Lee is recognized for his cinematic storytelling, strong atmosphere, and visually striking compositions.
name: Topel Lee
